_comment: Credential rotation deadline policy for broodforge (Phase 1.P). All intervals in days.

restic.notes: Restic repo password — dual-key window required; use forge-rotate-credential.sh --service restic

headscale.notes: Headscale API key — operator generates new key in service before rotation ceremony

k8s-sa.notes: Kubernetes service account token — use forge-rotate-credential.sh --service k8s-sa

forge-autonomous-child-db.notes: Child DB master password — rotation requires KeeShare re-setup; do not rotate without planning

forge-spawn-child-db.notes: Child DB master password — rotation requires KeeShare re-setup; do not rotate without planning

forge-migrate-child-db.notes: Child DB master password — populated only during migration ceremony
